professionalSummary: Detail-oriented Business Analyst with a proven track record of transforming complex data into actionable insights, driving data-backed decisions, and improving business performance. Adept at workflow optimization, dashboard development, and cross-functional collaboration. Committed to enhancing operational efficiency and supporting organizational growth through data analysis.

achievements: Developed automated dashboards, improving operational visibility by 40%.
Led organization-wide data-driven optimization projects, resulting in measurable performance gains.
Standardized documentation (BRDs, SOPs, workflow charts) to unify processes across teams.
Presented strategic insights directly to senior leadership, influencing quarterly business roadmaps.
Designed predictive forecasting models to optimize marketing campaigns and reduce spending waste.
Automated manual reporting workflows, decreasing manual labor by 60%.
Collaborated with department leads to interpret data, recommend strategies, and improve KPIs.
Managed data systems and prepared monthly performance and analytics reports for management.
Supported inventory reconciliation and improved documentation accuracy across departments.
Enhanced organizational workflows through better data tracking systems.
